languages.text: "Кажется, мы рассердили целую планету, {name}. Конечно же, решать вам — губернатор-полковник исполнит любой приказ. Но позвольте мне защитить моих ребят — не разбрасывайтесь их жизнями попусту".

"It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Colonel-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."
languages.original_text: "Кажется, мы рассердили целую планету, {name}. Конечно же, решать вам — губернатор-полковник исполнит любой приказ. Но позвольте мне защитить моих ребят — не разбрасывайтесь их жизнями попусту".

traits.locale_text: "It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Colonel-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."

"It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Castellan-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."

"It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Castellan-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."

"It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Colonel-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."

languages.text: 「我々は地球全体を怒らせてしまったようだな、{name}。もちろん、君の決断だ。城守は君の命令に従う。だが、我々の民を守ることを許してくれ。彼らの命を無駄にしないように」
languages.original_text: "It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Castellan-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."

traits.locale_text: 「我々は地球全体を怒らせてしまったようだな、{name}。もちろん、君の決断だ。城守は君の命令に従う。だが、我々の民を守ることを許してくれ。彼らの命を無駄にしないように。」

languages.text: «Parece que hemos enfadado al planeta al completo, {name}. La decisión es suya, por supuesto; sus súbditos seguirán sus órdenes. Pero permita que proteja a mi gente. No los sacrifique sin necesidad».
languages.original_text: "It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Colonel-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."

traits.locale_text: «Parece que hemos enfadado al planeta al completo, {name}. La decisión es suya, por supuesto; sus súbditos seguirán sus órdenes. Pero permita que proteja a mi gente. No los sacrifique sin necesidad».

languages.text: “看来我们激怒了整颗行星，{name}。当然，最终决策权在您手中。总督上校会无条件执行您的命令。但请准许我保护我的人民，不要让他们白白牺牲。”
languages.original_text: "It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Colonel-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."

traits.locale_text: “看来我们激怒了整颗行星，{name}。当然，最终决策权在您手中。总督上校会无条件执行您的命令。但请准许我保护我的人民，不要让他们白白牺牲。”

languages.text: "Wir scheinen den gesamten Planten verärgert zu haben, {name}. Natürlich trefft Ihr die Entscheidung ... {nc|die Colonel-Gouverneurin|der Colonel-Gouverneur} wird jeden Befehl ausführen. Aber lasst mich meine Leute beschützen ... werft ihr Leben nicht für nichts weg."
languages.original_text: "It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Colonel-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."

traits.locale_text: "Wir scheinen den gesamten Planten verärgert zu haben, {name}. Natürlich trefft Ihr die Entscheidung ... {nc|die Colonel-Gouverneurin|der Colonel-Gouverneur} wird jeden Befehl ausführen. Aber lasst mich meine Leute beschützen ... werft ihr Leben nicht für nichts weg."

languages.text: "Görünüşe göre tüm gezegeni kızdırdık. Karar elbette sizin. Vali Albay, her emri yerine getirecektir. Fakat izin verin halkımı koruyayım, hayatlarını boş yere harcamayın."
languages.original_text: "It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Colonel-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."

traits.locale_text: "Görünüşe göre tüm gezegeni kızdırdık. Karar elbette sizin. Vali Albay, her emri yerine getirecektir. Fakat izin verin halkımı koruyayım, hayatlarını boş yere harcamayın."

languages.text: « Il semblerait que nous ayons provoqué le courroux de la planète tout entière, {name}. La décision vous revient, bien entendu, et vos ordres seront suivis à la lettre par {nc|la gouverneure-colonelle|le gouverneur-colonel}. Cependant, permettez-moi de protéger les miens. Ne sacrifiez pas leurs vies en vain. »
languages.original_text: "It seems we've angered the entire planet, {name}. It's your decision, of course — the Colonel-Governor will carry out any order. But let me protect my people — don't throw their lives away for nothing."

traits.locale_text: « Il semblerait que nous ayons provoqué le courroux de la planète tout entière, {name}. La décision vous revient, bien entendu, et vos ordres seront suivis à la lettre par {nc|la gouverneure-colonelle|le gouverneur-colonel}. Cependant, permettez-moi de protéger les miens. Ne sacrifiez pas leurs vies en vain. »
